overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character riding a futuristic Yaiba Kusanagi motorcycle with deployable yellow wing panels. The character drives at high speed on highways before taking flight and gliding over desert outskirts and through dense futuristic skyscraper canyons, eventually landing on rooftops. The footage showcases the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with neon-lit buildings and advanced vehicle mechanics.

agents.ego_description: riding the futuristic motorcycle at high speed on the highway, leaning forward in a racing posture

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt highway stretching into the distance
large industrial structures and factories in the background
tall electrical transmission towers and power lines
scattered bushes and dry grass along the highway edges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows high-speed ground driving on a multi-lane highway through an industrial area. The futuristic motorcycle speeds along asphalt with industrial buildings and power lines visible in the distance under a clear midday sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange and industrial complex

events.description: motorcycle deploys yellow wing panels and takes off from the highway, transitioning from ground driving to flight

agents.ego_description: activating the motorcycle's flight mode and ascending over the highway interchange, gliding above the road network

entered.detail: complex network of highway ramps and overpasses visible below
cluster of industrial buildings and storage tanks
distant futuristic city skyline with tall buildings
large yellow construction crane near the highway

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle takes flight using deployable yellow wing panels, ascending over a complex highway interchange. The view opens up to show the industrial district and distant city skyline while the bike glides above the road network.

events.description: flying from industrial highway area into open desert landscape with mountains

agents.ego_description: flying the motorcycle over arid desert terrain, maintaining altitude while heading toward the mountain range

entered.detail: arid desert ground with sand and sparse dry vegetation
large brown mountain range in the distance
scattered palm trees along the desert edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open desert outskirts as the motorcycle flies over arid terrain with sparse palm trees. Mountains rise in the background while the urban area remains visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway edge between desert and urban district

events.description: transitioning from desert back to urban edge, flying parallel to highway with city buildings on one side

agents.ego_description: flying along the highway edge, balancing between the urban skyline and desert hills while maintaining high speed

entered.detail: contemporary urban buildings and residential blocks
line of palm trees marking the desert boundary

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle flies along the boundary between city and desert, with modern buildings lining the left side and arid hills to the right. The highway runs parallel below as the bike maintains steady flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk urban canyon with skyscrapers

events.description: entering dense urban canyon between towering skyscrapers with neon advertisements
navigating through tight spaces between buildings, banking left and right to avoid structures

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the flying motorcycle through narrow gaps between towering skyscrapers, dodging structures and navigating the urban canyon

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers towering on both sides
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
multi-level highway system running through the city canyon

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a dense urban canyon, weaving between towering glass and steel skyscrapers covered in neon billboards. The space becomes enclosed as the bike navigates through narrow gaps between high-rise buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop and elevated roadway system in city center

events.description: landing the motorcycle on a rooftop structure and transitioning back to ground driving

agents.ego_description: landing the flying motorcycle on a rooftop and continuing to drive along elevated roads and building tops, navigating the high-rise infrastructure

entered.detail: building rooftops and elevated platforms used as roads
elevated monorail or train tracks running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle lands on a rooftop and transitions back to wheeled driving, navigating elevated roads and building tops. The surrounding skyscrapers create a semi-enclosed environment as the bike speeds along the high-rise infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that begins with ground-level driving in an industrial zone and evolves into an aerial glide across diverse landscapes before returning to the city's heights. It begins with a motorcycle speeding along a multi-lane highway under a clear midday sky, before the vehicle deploys yellow wing panels to ascend over a complex highway interchange. As the bike glides further, the industrial district gives way to open desert outskirts characterized by arid terrain, sparse palm trees, and distant mountains. The scene then shifts as the motorcycle flies along the boundary between the desert and the city, eventually diving into a dense urban canyon to weave between towering glass skyscrapers and neon billboards. Finally, the bike descends to land on a rooftop, transitioning back to wheeled driving as it navigates the elevated infrastructure of the high-rise environment.
